name: python3-pyqt5
title: python3-pyqt5
description:
Python 3 bindings for Qt5
PyQt5 exposes the Qt5 API to Python 3. This package contains the following
modules:
* QtCore
* QtDBus
* QtDesigner
* QtGui
* QtHelp
* QtNetwork
* QtPrintSupport
* QtTest
* QtWidgets
* QtXml
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pyqt5 because Python 3 bindings for Qt5.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pyqt5 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pyqt5 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pyqt5 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
